sand-fall-straight.name: Falls straight down
sand-fall-straight.description: One grain above empty space moves down one cell.

sand-blocked-below.name: Stays when blocked below
sand-blocked-below.description: Wall under sand — no escape, grain stays.

sand-stack-settles.name: Stack settles one step
sand-stack-settles.description: Two grains above empty — both fall one cell.

sand-on-floor.name: Does not pass through wall
sand-on-floor.description: Sand sitting on wall stays put.

sand-fall-two-steps.name: Falls two cells in two ticks
sand-fall-two-steps.description: Keeps falling while empty space is below.

sand-diagonal-left.name: Slides down-left
sand-diagonal-left.description: Blocked below; randDir forced left → down-left empty cell.

sand-diagonal-right.name: Slides down-right
sand-diagonal-right.description: Blocked below; randDir forced right → down-right empty cell.

sand-diagonal-blocked-no-retry.name: Stays when chosen diagonal is blocked
sand-diagonal-blocked-no-retry.description: One random try per tick — open other diagonal is not attempted.

sand-no-move-rand-zero.name: Stays when rand picks straight (0)
sand-no-move-rand-zero.description: randDir=0 checks down-diagonal only — still blocked.

sand-one-cell-per-tick.name: Moves at most one cell per tick
sand-one-cell-per-tick.description: Tall empty column — one cell per tick, not teleport to bottom.

sand-on-sand-on-wall.name: Stack on wall with no gap stays put
sand-on-sand-on-wall.description: Sand on sand on wall — no empty cell, nothing moves.

sand-flat-floor-center.name: Rests on flat floor without sliding
sand-flat-floor-center.description: Centered on floor — diagonals blocked, stays put.

sand-three-stack-settles.name: Three-grain stack settles one step
sand-three-stack-settles.description: Bottom-up scan: stack drops one cell when space below.

sand-rest-on-water.name: Sinks through water
sand-rest-on-water.description: Denser sand swaps with lighter water below (Sandspiel-aligned).

water-fall-straight.name: Falls straight down
water-fall-straight.description: Water above empty space moves down one cell.

water-fall-two-steps.name: Falls two cells in two ticks
water-fall-two-steps.description: Keeps falling while empty space is below.

water-rest-on-sand.name: Rests on denser sand
water-rest-on-sand.description: Less-dense water does not swap through sand below.

water-spread-right.name: Spreads horizontally
water-spread-right.description: On flat floor with empty to the right → flows sideways.

water-spread-left.name: Spreads left when blocked right
water-spread-left.description: Wall on the right → flows left.

water-one-cell-per-tick.name: Moves at most one cell per tick
water-one-cell-per-tick.description: Tall empty column — one cell per tick.

water-sinks-steam.name: Sinks through lighter steam
water-sinks-steam.description: Denser water swaps with buoyant steam below.

water-stack-settles.name: Stack settles one step
water-stack-settles.description: Two water cells above empty — both fall one cell.

water-boxed-no-spread.name: Stays when fully boxed
water-boxed-no-spread.description: Surrounded by walls — no horizontal escape.

water-rest-on-stone.name: Rests on denser stone
water-rest-on-stone.description: Water does not swap through stone below.

steam-rise-straight.name: Rises straight up
steam-rise-straight.description: Empty above → move up one cell.

steam-rise-two-steps.name: Rises two cells in two ticks
steam-rise-two-steps.description: Keeps rising while empty space is above.

steam-diagonal-up-right.name: Rises diagonally up-right
steam-diagonal-up-right.description: Blocked straight up; randDir right → up-right empty cell.

steam-diagonal-up-left.name: Rises diagonally up-left
steam-diagonal-up-left.description: Blocked straight up; randDir left → up-left empty cell.

steam-one-cell-per-tick.name: Moves at most one cell per tick
steam-one-cell-per-tick.description: Tall empty column above — one cell per tick.

fire-burns-out.name: Burns out when heat is low

fire-extinguish-water.name: Dies on contact with water
fire-extinguish-water.description: Random neighbor is water → fire clears.

fire-drifts-to-empty.name: Drifts into empty neighbor
fire-drifts-to-empty.description: Hot fire moves into adjacent empty cell.

fire-ignites-organic.name: Ignites organic neighbor
fire-ignites-organic.description: Random neighbor is organic → spawns fire there.

fire-blocked-surrounded.name: Stays when surrounded by walls
fire-blocked-surrounded.description: No empty neighbor — fire remains (heat still decays internally).

organic-ignite-fire.name: Ignites when touching fire
organic-ignite-fire.description: Adjacent fire sets rb burn countdown; renderer tints while rb > 0.

organic-burns-away.name: Burns away at end of countdown
organic-burns-away.description: rb counts down to 1 → cell clears.

organic-spreads-fire-while-burning.name: Spreads fire while burning
organic-spreads-fire-while-burning.description: rb > 1 and empty neighbor → spawns fire.

organic-grows-near-water.name: Grows toward water
organic-grows-near-water.description: Near water + growth roll → new organic cell in empty neighbor.

stone-fall-straight.name: Falls straight down
stone-fall-straight.description: Stone above empty space moves down one cell.

stone-sinks-water.name: Sinks through water
stone-sinks-water.description: Denser stone swaps upward with lighter water below.

stone-on-floor.name: Does not pass through wall
stone-on-floor.description: Stone sitting on wall stays put.

stone-stack-settles.name: Stack settles one step
stone-stack-settles.description: Two stones above empty — both fall one cell.

stone-diagonal-right.name: Slides down-right
stone-diagonal-right.description: Blocked below; randDir forced right → down-right empty cell.

stone-diagonal-left.name: Slides down-left
stone-diagonal-left.description: Blocked below; randDir forced left → down-left empty cell.

stone-sinks-steam.name: Sinks through steam
stone-sinks-steam.description: Denser stone swaps with lighter steam below.

stone-flat-floor-center.name: Rests on flat floor without sliding
stone-flat-floor-center.description: Centered on floor — diagonals blocked, stays put.

dust-floats-on-water.name: Rests above water
dust-floats-on-water.description: Lighter than water — stays on top.

dust-diagonal-right.name: Slides down-right when blocked below
dust-diagonal-right.description: Blocked below; randDir forced right → down-right empty cell.

oil-floats-water.name: Rests above water
oil-floats-water.description: Less dense than water — does not sink through water below.

oil-ignite-lava.name: Ignites when touching lava
oil-ignite-lava.description: Lava contact starts oil burn timer (rb); species stays oil on tick 1.

oil-burns-away.name: Burns away at end of countdown

gas-one-cell-per-tick.name: Moves at most one cell per tick

ice-static.name: Does not fall
ice-static.description: Static solid — stays when empty below.

wood-ignite-fire.name: Ignites when touching fire
wood-ignite-fire.description: Burn timer rb starts; cell tints ember while species stays wood.

wood-burns-away.name: Burns away at end of countdown
wood-burns-away.description: rb counts down to 1 → cell clears.

wood-spreads-fire.name: Spreads fire while burning
wood-spreads-fire.description: rb divisible by spreadEvery → spawns fire in empty neighbor.

acid-corrodes-sand.name: Corrodes sand neighbor
acid-corrodes-sand.description: Touches sand → sand dissolves, acid consumed.

seed-germinates-sand.name: Germinates into plant on sand
seed-germinates-sand.description: Resting on sand with lucky roll → organic.

fungus-ignite-fire.name: Ignites when touching fire
fungus-ignite-fire.description: Species stays fungus; rb burn timer starts and renderer tints toward ember (rb > 0).

fungus-burns-away.name: Burns away at end of countdown

fungus-grows-on-wood.name: Spreads into empty cell beside wood

rocket-fall-straight.name: Falls straight down leaving sand
rocket-fall-straight.description: Rocket moves down and leaves a sand grain behind (Sandspiel-style exhaust).

reaction-water-fire-steam.name: Water and fire make steam
reaction-water-fire-steam.description: Adjacent water + fire → steam at fire cell, water cleared.

reaction-fire-organic-ignites.name: Fire ignites organic
reaction-fire-organic-ignites.description: Adjacent fire + organic → organic becomes fire.

reaction-no-op-when-separated.name: No reaction without contact
reaction-no-op-when-separated.description: Water and fire with gap → unchanged.

reaction-water-fire-vertical.name: Water above fire makes steam
reaction-water-fire-vertical.description: Stacked water + fire → steam at fire, water cleared.

reaction-fire-water-horizontal.name: Fire left of water makes steam
reaction-fire-water-horizontal.description: Fire as cell a still reacts when water is neighbor b.

reaction-fire-wood.name: Fire ignites wood
reaction-fire-wood.description: Adjacent fire + wood → wood becomes fire.

grenade-ignites-organic.name: Blast ignites organic at center
grenade-ignites-organic.description: Radial blast converts plant matter to fire.

grenade-direct-apply.name: Direct blast clears center to fire
grenade-direct-apply.description: applyGrenadeBlast on sand spawns fire at the impact cell.
